case_title: PRO GENERAL ROOFING CORP. C/O KANG YONG HAN VS DENNIS BLUM MR. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PRO GENERAL ROOFING CORP. C/O KANG YONG HAN AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS BLUM MR. BLUM DIANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED LETTER TO DENNIS BLUM RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF OCT-16-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLUM DIANE

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DENNIS BLUM MR. BLUM DIANE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PRO GENERAL ROOFING CORP. C/O KANG YONG HAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRO GENERAL ROOFING CORP. C/O KANG YONG HAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DENNIS BLUM MR. BLUM DIANE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PRO GENERAL ROOFING CORP. C/O KANG YONG HAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-30-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
